languages.text: Судя по следам, импровизированную баррикаду проломили с другой стороны.

traits.locale_text: Судя по следам, импровизированную баррикаду проломили с другой стороны.
Судя по следам, импровизированную баррикаду проломили с другой стороны.

languages.text: Judging by the traces, the improvised barricade was broken though from the other side.
languages.original_text: Судя по следам, импровизированную баррикаду проломили с другой стороны.

traits.locale_text: Judging by the traces, the improvised barricade was broken though from the other side.
Judging by the traces, the improvised barricade was broken though from the other side.
Judging by the traces, the improvised barricade was broken though from the other side.

languages.text: Den Spuren nach zu urteilen, wurde die improvisierte Barrikade von der anderen Seite her durchbrochen.
languages.original_text: Judging by the traces, the improvised barricade was broken though from the other side.

languages.text: À en juger par les traces, la barricade improvisée a été franchie de l'autre côté.
languages.original_text: Judging by the traces, the improvised barricade was broken though from the other side.

languages.text: 从痕迹来看，简易路障是从另一侧被突破的。
languages.original_text: Judging by the traces, the improvised barricade was broken though from the other side.

languages.text: A juzgar por los rastros, la improvisada barricada se rompió desde el otro lado.
languages.original_text: Judging by the traces, the improvised barricade was broken though from the other side.

languages.text: 痕跡から判断すると、即席のバリケードは向こう側から壊されたようだ。
languages.original_text: Judging by the traces, the improvised barricade was broken though from the other side.

languages.text: İzlere bakılırsa, doğaçlama barikat diğer taraftan kırılmış.
languages.original_text: Judging by the traces, the improvised barricade was broken though from the other side.
